name: useList
description: Hook that provides state and helper methods to manage a list of items
examples: const { value, set, push, removeAt, insertAt, updateAt, clear } = useList();

source.source: * @param {Item[] | (() => Item[])} initialList The initial list of items

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current list and functions to interact with the list

source.source: * @returns {UseListReturn} An object containing the current list and functions to interact with the list

tokens.name: An
tokens.description: object containing the current list and functions to interact with the list
